events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. The condition — aluminum conductor landed on a device without a CO/ALR (or AL-CU) rating — is a clear NEC 110.14(A) violation and a recognized fire hazard (loose/high-resistance connections from aluminum's thermal expansion and oxidation), so `decision: fail`, `risk: high`. Corrective action is either swap in a CO/ALR-rated device or pigtail with a listed AL-CU connector, plus re-verifying conductor sizing against the aluminum ampacity column of Table 310.16.
